narrative:
Gibson Twp township has 1,448 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 45.0 percentage points.
